Google Jules Update: The AI Coding Agent Just Got Insane

Google has integrated Gemini 3.1 Pro into Jules, its autonomous coding agent that writes code and opens pull requests while you sleep. This massive update introduces groundbreaking features like visual verification, advanced reasoning, and support for up to 60 concurrent tasks. Discover how the shift from manual coding to AI management is revolutionizing software development.

04:12 - Scaling to 60 Concurrent Tasks
05:20 - The Shift from Coder to Manager
06:34 - Future Roadmap & Getting Started
